name: Lee Mack
bio: Lee Mack is an English comedian and writer known for rapid-fire wordplay and quick wit. He won So You Think Youre Funny at the 1995 Edinburgh Festival Fringe and rose through the stand-up circuit before creating and starring in the long-running BBC sitcom Not Going Out. He is a regular team captain on the panel show Would I Lie to You.

timeline.ev: Wins So You Think Youre Funny
Not Going Out premieres on BBC One
Becomes team captain on Would I Lie to You
Stand-up DVD Hit the Road Mack released

accolades: Winner, So You Think Youre Funny (1995)
Perrier Award nomination for Lee Macks New Bits (2000)
British Comedy Award for Best Male Comedy Newcomer
